productDisplayName: Fastrack Unisex Blue Green Single Strap Backpack
description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this navy and fluroscent green backpack from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accomodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super funky!   Made of nylon for enhanced durability One large roomy main compartment with two smaller zippered pockets Mesh panels on the front for added attraction Small pouch on the front with a mesh outer Single adjustable strap that goes across the chest Padded strap with mesh on the inner side for better breathability and comfort Pouch with a velcro closure attached to the strap to hold a mobile phone Brand tab appliqued to mobile pouch and on the side Waist clasp to hold the bag in place Haul loop for handling ease Branded zippers and sliders for easy use CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
